operation: ownership_status enum normalization: hyphenated variants -> canonical underscore
why: Two writer scripts emitted 'dso-affiliated'/'pe-backed' (hyphen) while the canonical enum and every frontend consumer use 'dso_affiliated'/'pe_backed' (underscore). classifyPractice()'s ownership_status fallback (entity-classifications.ts:231) only recognizes the underscore spellings, so all 237 hyphenated rows silently degraded to 'unknown' in any fallback path. warroom.ts scope filters (654/660/721) are underscore-only as well.

before_counts.note: An earlier working figure of 115 for practice_locations was a mis-sum that included the underscore variant pe_backed (18); the correct hyphenated-only counts are 97 (locations) and 140 (NPI rows), matching the analyst's re-baseline.

change: UPDATE <tbl> SET ownership_status = REPLACE(ownership_status,'-','_'), updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE ownership_status LIKE '%-%'  -- run on practices (140 rows) and practice_locations (97 rows)
non_writers_left_alone: scrapers/beckers_scraper.py:80 — news-headline keyword matcher, not a DB write
scope_notes: entity_classification untouched; census OWN_COLS untouched; detector floor (268/1,152) unaffected by construction (this column feeds only the legacy fallback layer). updated_at bumped on all 237 rows per the raw-SQL flip-script rule.
supabase_mirror: surgical REST PATCH on the same predicate (ownership_status=eq.dso-affiliated / eq.pe-backed) on both tables; NO full sync run. Read-back verification recorded in this file's supabase_verification key.

before_patch.note: practices mirror held 159 hyphenated vs local's 140 — 157 were spelling-only (aligned by normalization) and 2 were genuine value drift: NPIs 1023549078 + 1790819340 read 'pe-backed' in Supabase but 'dso_affiliated' in local SQLite (both All Family Dental & Braces / UDP, updated_at 2026-06-19T15:04:34 — an out-of-sync leg of the June-19 promotions). Local SQLite is source of truth; both PATCHed to dso_affiliated.

supabase_verification.method: REST PATCH with Prefer: count=exact per predicate; updated_at bumped; NO full sync run
